name: netdust-core
description: Netdust harness core: per-project memory + observability (deterministic tag scanner + optional Haiku), session hooks (SubagentStop testing-gate, Stop, SessionStart), cross-stack skills (harnessed-development [the single full-harness entry point], research, marketing, brand-voice, code-audit, shake-out, testing-workflow, test-effectiveness, threat-modeling, architecture-invariants, secure-server, ploi, dev-stack), 7 code-reviewer agents, the 9-method /deploy dispatcher, /integration + /shakeout phase/spec gates, and the ploi MCP. Stack-agnostic. Layered on by netdust-wp, netdust-bun-react, etc.
